SLIMEBOSS-SLURP.title: Slurp
SLIMEBOSS-SLURP.description: Add random "Licks" from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SLIMEBOSS-COMMAND.title: Command
SLIMEBOSS-CONSUME.title: Consume
SLIMEBOSS-CONSUME.description: Bonus effect which activates when an Attack is used on an enemy who has [gold]Goop[/gold].
